VisionSystemCPP HELP

This section will become the operational manual for the application.

Recommended flow for programming a part:
1. Setup: acquire or import the sample image and configure localization.
2. Edge detection: configure points, lines, circles and arcs to detect.
3. Constructed geometries: create intersections, tangents, offsets and projections.
4. Measurements: create dimensional checks from detected or constructed geometries.
5. Tolerances: assign nominal values, limits and OK/NOK rules.

The next help files will describe individual commands and camera controls.
